_source: n15g/coh-content-db-homecoming bundle.json v2.2.2 (Unlicense / public domain); coordinates + directions only.
_credit: Badge locations and directions by n15g (coh-content-db). The game client supplies each badge's identity; this adds only where it is.
_join: keyed by the game's internal badge id (badges.bin 'name' == content-db 'gameId').

BloodyBayTour1.hint: Located on top of the casino building 120 yards due east of Meteor Do.

BloodyBayTour2.hint: Located in the Forgotten Forest neighborhood, approx. 100 feet south of Meteor Panch.

BloodyBayTour3.hint: Located on a building rooftop 110 yards north and slightly east of Meteor Teen.

BloodyBayTour4.hint: Located 185 yards east and slightly north of the Ground Zero neighborhood inside a small building with a tunnel through it over the stone walkway.

CapAuDiableTour1.hint: Located in the Power Transport System station in the Mount Diable neighborhood. There is a building with two large electrical quad-towers on it. The badge marker is on top of the building, right in the middle of those two towers.

CapAuDiableTour2.hint: Located atop the large WSPDR tower east of the New Haven marker, next to the eastern antenna.

CapAuDiableTour3.hint: Located on top of the university right above the front door.

CapAuDiableTour4.hint: Located 88 feet southeast of the Mount Diable marker, just east of a couple of towers holding up large pipes.

CapAuDiableTour5.hint: Located just outside a door in the Gold Brick factory just north of the New Haven marker. The badge marker is at the northwestern corner of the building, between a garage door and a truck with a yellow cab.

GrandvilleTour1.hint: Located in the Gutter neighborhood, outside the main walls. 1. From the Gutter marker, head slightly east of due northeast (about one tick right of NE on the compass) to reach the beach access door and exit outside. 2. Once through the door, head due east toward a small concrete bunker near the beach, uf you reach the sand, you've gone too far—turn around and you will see the bunker. 3. The badge marker is located on top of the bunker, just above the door.

GrandvilleTour2.hint: Located in The Gutter neighborhood of Grandville, on top of a sewer pipe located 216 yards northeast of The Gutter marker.

GrandvilleTour3.hint: Located 228 yards south-southwest of the Spider City marker.

GrandvilleTour4.hint: Located in the Tangle neighborhood, on a ledge of the large central tower. The badge is positioned on the south face of the tower, just above the prominent Arachnos logo.

MercyIslandTour1.hint: Located on a ledge between two large tanks in a pool of greenish water. The tanks are in the far northwestern part of the island, and the badge marker is 602 yards west-northwest of the Darwin's Landing marker.

MercyIslandTour2.hint: Located in a snake pit approximately 507 yards due west of the Darwin's Landing marker.

MercyIslandTour3.hint: Located on a small island due south of Fort Darwin (a base taken over by Longbow), on a small beach on the northwest side of the island.

MercyIslandTour4.hint: Located on one of the wall supports around the Mercy neighborhood, far east of the elevator into Mercy from Darwin's Landing. To reach it, walk east along the Mercy side of the wall until it makes a 45° turn to the southeast. The support is just on the other side of the wall after that turn. It is possible to reach the badge marker without flying or teleporting: 1. There is a spiral ramp that leads up the next-to-last buiding before the turn. 2. One can leap from the top of that ramp onto a pipe, then onto the roof of that building. 3. From there, leap to the lower roof of the next building (the one in the corner). 4. Then with careful timing and the Sprint power on, leap onto the top of the wall. 5. (Note: You must leap onto the diagonal northwest-southeast wall, not the east-west wall.) 6. From there, look over the edge of the wall for the outside support, and the badge marker is visible on the tip of it.

MercyIslandTour5.hint: Located just inside the Mercy neighborhood at the top of the high wall surrounding it. If you take the elevator up from mongoose's location and walk straight towards Arbiter Richard, the badge marker is about halfway to the Arbiter.

MercyIslandTour6.hint: Located outside the door of the very tall tower in the northeast corner of Fort Cerberus.

NervaTour1.hint: Located on the northernmost island of Crimson Cove, between the feet of the southern statue in front of the large building, atop the plinth.

NervaTour2.hint: Located in the Agincourt neighborhood, under a shed with mesh-net walls 120 yards north-northeast of the zone marker.

NervaTour3.hint: Located in the Primeva neighborhood, on the lowest rock outcropping near the shipwreck at the river’s mouth, where it meets the largest island. Approximately 533 yards southeast of the Primeva marker or the northernmost Quartermaster.

NervaTour4.hint: Located in the Primeva neighborhood, 266 yards north-northwest of the Primeva marker. The marker is well-hidden by being near no particular landmark. 1. Go to the jungle below the Primeva marker and head north. 2. When you reach a bridge, scale down the cliff and head left (west). You will soon come to a pyramid. 4. Just past the pyramid, there are two large columns. 5. The badge marker is within a fern just past and to the left of southernmost column.

NervaTour5.hint: Located in the Thorn Isle neighborhood, at the northwestern base of the large thorn tree in the center of the neighborhood.

PortOakesTour1.hint: Located on Blackbeard's Pub, a shack near Drea the Hook in the Dockside neighborhood, approximately 190 yards south and slightly east of the Dockside marker. The badge marker is on the southwest side of the building, atop a small landing supported by corrugated metal.

PortOakesTour2.hint: Located in the Fort Hades neighborhood, on top of a rusted blue car near the water, directly east of the Fort Hades marker.

PortOakesTour3.hint: Located behind three cannons in the Fort Hades neighborhood, approx. 154 yards east and slightly south of the Fort Hades marker.

PortOakesTour4.hint: Located on a sunken ship off the southwest coast. The marker is almost where the water comes over the deck.

ReclusesVictoryTour1.hint: Located in Sector 5, in front of the Atlas Statue, just behind the dais that ms-liberty stands on in the hero's version of Atlas Park.

ReclusesVictoryTour2.hint: Located in Sector 3, 418 yards due south of the Echo pillbox. The badge is at the northern end of a cobblestone walkway on the western edge of a small park.

ReclusesVictoryTour3.hint: Located in Sector 1, due west of the ramp leading out of the monorail station in a narrow alleyway between two buildings.

ReclusesVictoryTour4.hint: Located in Sector 2, beneath the monorail track behind a store roughly midway between the Foxtrot and Golf pillboxes—slightly closer to Foxtrot.

SharkheadTour1.hint: Located in The Pit neighborhood, on a small rock outcropping at the southern end of a beach, 86 yards due south of the Magic Quartermaster.

SharkheadTour2.hint: Located in the Hell Forge neighborhood, just west of the Hell Forge marker there are three large silo tanks, the badge marker is on the ground just north of the northernmost tank.

SharkheadTour3.hint: Located just east of the center of the Freakshow shanty 295 yards north of The Crush neighborhood marker. There is a metal grate bridge leading to a lookout point. The marker is at the start of that metal grate bridge.

SharkheadTour4.hint: Located at the bottom of the pit in The Pit neighborhood, 70 feet west of the zone marker.

SirensCallTour1.hint: Located on a small rock outcropping at the very base of the northern wall of the zone, just off the western shore of the villain base, about 190 yards west of the sharkhead-isle transfer.

SirensCallTour2.hint: Located to the right (north) of the doorway of the building immediately east of the hero base.

SirensCallTour3.hint: Located at the base of the meteor monument just southwest of the inset corner east of the hero base.

SirensCallTour4.hint: Located in a grassy area close the water on the villain base island, south of the base.

StMartialTour1.hint: Located in the doorway of the Ice Palace casino in the Jackpot neighborhood, 150 yards east of the Jackpot neighborhood marker.

StMartialTour2.hint: Located in the Fortune's Wheel neighborhood, approximately 138 yards west of its marker. The badge can be found at the base of a tree along a fractured road leading out of the Black Mariah neighborhood.

StMartialTour3.hint: Located in the Babylon neighborhood, at ground level inside the southernmost obelisk due southeast of the Golden Giza casino. The marker itself is not visible due to the obelisk.

StMartialTour4.hint: Located on the Golden Giza casino in the Babylon neighborhood, on the top balcony (the last one before you reach the top of the pyramid). It is just west of the centerline of the slope.

TutorialTour3.hint: Located in The Zig, inside the final cell on the right at the top floor of the cell block. 1. From where you start outside your cell, turn right, walking away from H.T. 2. When you get to the cell walls, turn around and you'll see a staircase leading up. 3. Go all the way upstairs, and walk left, with the cells to your right. 4. The badge marker is inside the last cell on the right. It isn't visible, but once you pass close enough to it by entering the cell, you will earn the badge. This badge is also available while revisiting the Zig during the ouroboros Initiation Story Arc.

WarburgTour1.hint: Located in the center of the top of the western scaffolding surrounding the missile silo.

WarburgTour2.hint: Located in the far eastern entrance of the WEB underground missile plant (the entrance/exit of chamber three).

WarburgTour3.hint: Located at the top of the golden globe with the rocket flying around it in the center of the map.

MayhemMap1.hint: Located on the sidewalk just inside the entrance point. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap2.hint: Located approximately 113 yards northeast of the Bank. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap3.hint: Located in the middle of the road, at the main switchback in the center of the map. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap4.hint: Located behind the police station, in a corner next to a garage door, about 66 yards south-southeast of the Jail entrance. The marker might be hidden by packing crates and a dumpster. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap5.hint: Located on the southwest end of the sandbank in the southwest part of the map. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap6.hint: Located in an alley between buildings, almost directly East of the entrance point. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap7.hint: Located in an alley behind the Paragon Police Station. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap8.hint: Located under the edge of a fountain, approximately 140 yards east of the bank. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

MayhemMap9.hint: Located at the fence in front of you as you zone in. Out-levelled Mayhem missions can be accessed via lord-schweinzer.

SafeguardMap1.hint: Located just east of the mission entrance, next to a mailbox. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap2.hint: Located between two large crates, just north of the prominent building in the southwestern part of the zone. The spot is approximately 171 yards northeast of the zone’s southwestern corner. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap3.hint: Located just north of the entrance door of the southeastern warehouse building, just next to a delivery truck with a bronze colored cab. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap4.hint: Located in the bottom right (southwestern) cutaway corner of a four-story apartment building in the central western part of the map. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap5.hint: Located in a narrow alley behind and slightly northeast of the crane on the northeastern side of the inlet. The alley sits beside a U-shaped building with two payphones, and the badge is found within. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap6.hint: Located in the middle of the northernmost alley between the stores that line the central part of the map. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap7.hint: Located on the ground just left (west) of the warehouse building in the northeastern corner of the zone, between the two right (eastern) legs of a large power line tower. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap8.hint: Located at the bottom of the northern ramp outside the police station, almost against the northern force field in the zone. Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

SafeguardMap9.hint: Located in a walled-in area southeast of a Blackwell store almost in the geographic center of the missions zone. (It's the building with the radio antenna on top of it.) Out-levelled Safeguard missions can be accessed via agent-hassel.

CageFighter.hint: When staging a PvP duel via the terminals in Pocket D or in the Arena, there is a duel map that matches the Monkey Fight Club in Pocket D, placing you in the cage for the match. In the center of the cage is the exploration badge. The badge may be earned by either Heroes or Villains, and can even be earned by using spectator mode on someone else's match in the same map. Note that it is possible to brute-force a character into the cage in the actual Pocket D zone, but the badge is not available there. It is only present on the Arena map.

BigTime.hint: Located in the top left (northwestern) corner on the top floor of the Monkey Fight Club, in the hero alcove off the main dance floor.

TruckerTour.hint: On the truck floating outside of pocket-d. From the Chalet island, a character will need to fly, teleport, or super jump to reach the truck.

AbyssTour1.hint: Located in the northern part of the zone, beneath the center of the bowl-shaped water where Hamidon spawns. The badge sits underwater at the point where the surrounding streams converge and can be earned even when Hamidon is absent.

AbyssTour2.hint: Located at the front door of the DE Gen building located on the eastern side of the southern landmass.

RiktiWarZoneTour1.hint: Located in the Vanguard Base, about 25 feet in front of the contact Borea. **Note:** The badge marker is invisible.

RiktiWarZoneTour2.hint: Located in The Bulge neighborhood, 290 yards southwest of the area marker. Look for two Crey logos on a building. The badge is on the ground in the open on the left hand side of that building, and usually has Crey mobs on top of, or nearby it.

RiktiWarZoneTour3.hint: Located on the eastern side of the power substation, on the ground.

RiktiWarZoneTour4.hint: Located in the northeast corner of the Pavia neighborhood.

RiktiWarZoneTour6.hint: The Base Jumper Badge is located in Pork Chop Hill neighborhood, in the foyer of a Council-owned building just southwest of the Pork Chop Hill neighborhood marker. The building is marked with two large Council banners, with a cream colored foyer, and the marker is located inside behind the reception desk.

RiktiWarZoneTour7.hint: Located 345 yards south-west of the Little Round Top zone marker.

RiktiWarZoneTour8.hint: Located in Bloody Lane neighborhood, 90 yds west of the Bloody Lane neighborhood marker.

RiktiWarZoneTour9.hint: Located in Heartbreak Ridge neighborhood, 118 yards east of the Heartbreak Ridge zone marker.

RiktiWarZoneTour10.hint: Located on a broken fragment of road next to a destroyed building, a wrecked car is pointing at it.

RiktiWarZoneTour12.hint: Located in the center of the Rikti ship when the shields have been taken down by destroying all 20 Rikti Pylons.

RiktiWarZoneTour13.hint: On the top point of the tallest building overlooking the downed ship.

OuroborosTour1.hint: The Chrononaut Badge is located at the very top of the building structure.

CimeroraTour1.hint: Located next to the fountain in the central square, just in front of Marcus Valerius.

BattleHardened.hint: Located on a rampart overlooking the location where Imperious stands, 140 yards south of the Cimerora neighborhood marker.

CimeroraTour3.hint: Located in front of the temple entrance along the beach, 182 yards southwest of the Phoebas Point neighborhood marker.

CimeroraTour4.hint: Located 103 yards east of the Phoebas Point neighborhood marker, on an altar in the temple area.

CimeroraTour5.hint: Located 127 yards south of the Castellum Quarter neighborhood marker.

CimeroraTour6.hint: Located in front of the doors of a building at the center of the northern edge of Castellum Quarter, 451 yards north of the Castellum Quarter neighborhood marker.

CimeroraTour7.hint: Located in the northeast corner of the Castellum Quarter, in the center of a tower 533 yards northeast of the neighborhood marker.

CimeroraTour8.hint: Located 501 yards northwest of the Castellum Quarter neighborhood marker, between two trees along the cliffs.

MSClubTour1.hint: Located just inside the circular chamber at the North end of the Midnighter Club between the inner columns.

MercyIslandTour7.hint: Located in the Darwin's Landing neighborhood, in the middle of the triangular fight club arena 612 yards WSW of the neighborhood marker.

MercyIslandTour8.hint: Located in the Mercy neighborhood, directly in front of Larry's Tiki Lounge 133 yards SE of the neighborhood marker.

PortOakesTour5.hint: Located in the Arena District neighborhood, in the middle of the northern parking tunnel 73 yards south of the hospital.

PortOakesTour6.hint: Located in the Marconeville neighborhood, at the base of the stairs in front of the Supergroup building, 54 yards north of the neighborhood marker.

PortOakesTour7.hint: Located in the Oil Spill neighborhood, at the blocked off tunnel 194 yards west of the Quartermaster.

PortOakesTour8.hint: Located in the Villa Montrose neighborhood, at the front door of the remote house in the NW corner of the neighborhood, 590 yards west of the marker.

CapAuDiableTour6.hint: Located in the Vagabond Hills neighborhood, in the construction area 131 yards west of the neighborhood marker, near a bulldozer.

CapAuDiableTour7.hint: Located on top of the globe in the Aeon City neighborhood.

CapAuDiableTour8.hint: The Circle Gazer Badge is located in the New Haven neighborhood, on top of the easternmost Circle of Thorns monument, 261 yards NNW of the neighborhood marker.

SharkheadTour5.hint: Located in the Sky Raider base at the south edge of The Pit neighborhood, on the one upper platform that doesn't have a turret on it.

SharkheadTour6.hint: Located in The Pit neighborhood, at the entrance of the Council base 270 yards east of the neighborhood marker.

SharkheadTour7.hint: Located in the Villa Requin neighborhood,14 feet east of the neighborhood marker, in front of the eastern mansion.

SharkheadTour8.hint: Located in the Port Recluse neighborhood, in front of the cabin door of the ship in dry dock, 412 yards northwest of the neighborhood marker.

NervaTour6.hint: Located on the eastern island of the Crimson Cove neighborhood, in the middle of the southwestern specimen hangar, 597 yards east of the neighborhood marker.

NervaTour7.hint: Located in the Agincourt neighborhood,in the specimen building 58 yards beneath the neighborhood marker.

NervaTour8.hint: Located in the Primeva neighborhood in a cave behind the waterfall 240 yards east of the neighborhood marker.

StMartialTour5.hint: Located in the Black Mariah neighborhood, just a few yards south of the tree in the northwest corner of the neighborhood.

StMartialTour6.hint: Located in the Black Mariah neighborhood at the entrance of the underground slums 185 yards northeast of the neighborhood marker.

StMartialTour7.hint: Located in the Hard Way neighborhood, on top of the large pile of rubble 217 yards east of the neighborhood marker. **Note:** The texture of the rubble can make it hard to see the badge marker.

StMartialTour8.hint: Located in the Fortune's Wheel neighborhood, at the eastern entrance of the Carnival, 328 yards ENE of the neighborhood marker.

GrandvilleTour5.hint: Located in the Fab neighborhood, at the base of the ramp leading into the Fab, inside the entrance to the underground tunnels. The badge is just south of the neighborhood marker, in a sheltered area.

GrandvilleTour6.hint: Located in the Tangle neighborhood, 230 yards northeast of the Tangle marker on the ledge where you can find both Shadow Spider and Viridian, approximately halfway up the tower.

GrandvilleTour7.hint: Located in the Gutter neighborhood, at the gate between the North and East Wards, 64 yards ENE of the East Ward 2 Lift marker.

GrandvilleTour8.hint: Located in the Spider City neighborhood, on a catwalk overlooking the North Ward of the Gutter, 154 yards east of the Gutter neighborhood marker.

HollowsTour6.hint: Located near one of the buildings on top of the mountain in the Eastgate Heights neighborhood.

HollowsTour7.hint: Located in the Eastgate Park neighborhood, on top of the northernmost Circle of Thorns structure, 260 yards north of the neighborhood marker.

HollowsTour8.hint: Located in the Cherry Hills neighborhood on top of the building 433 yards ESE of the neighborhood marker.

GalaxyCityTour6.hint: Located in the Freedom Court neighborhood, at the base of the statue of Galaxy Girl directly behind Freedom Corps Headquarters.

GalaxyCityTour7.hint: Located in the Gemini Park neighborhood, near a set of three picnic tables 67 yards west of the neighborhood marker.

GalaxyCityTour8.hint: Located in the Orion Beltway neighborhood at the base of the statue 269 yards ESE of the neighborhood marker.

KingsRowTour6.hint: Located at the entrance of the construction site 155 yards north of Wentworth's.

KingsRowTour7.hint: Located at the entrance of the pawn shop 52 yards north of the High Park neighborhood marker.

KingsRowTour8.hint: Located at the entrance of the vacant rubble lot 110 yards west of the PPD building (Detective Becktrees or Detective Freitag markers).

SteelCanyonTour5.hint: Located at the back entrance of the building, 170 yards northwest of the south Paragon City Monorail station.

SteelCanyonTour6.hint: Located at the feet of the statue 129 yards east of the Royal Overlook neighborhood, or just in front of the base telepad location.

SteelCanyonTour7.hint: Located at the entrance to the construction zone 158 yards northeast of the north Paragon City Monorail station.

SteelCanyonTour8.hint: Located in the Platinum Lake neighborhood, 52 feet south of the neighborhood marker.

SkywayCityTour5.hint: The Better Days Badge is under the statue next to Jake Montoya, 286 yards west of the Architect Entertainment building.

SkywayCityTour6.hint: Located at the entrance of the parking lot between the faultline and bloody-bay zone connections.

SkywayCityTour7.hint: Located in the Hide Park neighborhood, in the middle of a small courtyard 238 yards west of the talos-island zone connection.

SkywayCityTour8.hint: Located in The Gruff neighborhood, in the middle of a free-standing section of bridge 490 yards SSE of the north Paragon City Monorail station.

CroatoaTour4.hint: Located in the Salamanca neighborhood, in the middle of a small pond 135 yards west of the neighborhood marker.

CroatoaTour5.hint: Located in the Salamanca neighborhood, under the easternmost umbrella on the beach, 246 yards northeast of the neighborhood marker.

CroatoaTour6.hint: Located in the Sunset Ridge neighborhood in the middle of a ruined building 214 yards NNE of the neighborhood marker.

CroatoaTour7.hint: Located in the New Connaught neighborhood, on the porch of the house 562 yards WNW of the Paragon City Monorail station.

CroatoaTour8.hint: Located in the middle of the bridge 60 yards south of Buck Salinger.

TalosIslandTour4.hint: Located on top of the large hill, just northwest of the ouroboros teleport beacon, 169 yards north of the Green Line station.

TalosIslandTour5.hint: Located 73 yards west of the Circe Island neighborhood marker, on the southwestern shore of the beach.

TalosIslandTour6.hint: Located on the main bridge leading into the New Thebes neighborhood, 187 yards NNW of the Hero Corps Field Analyst.

TalosIslandTour7.hint: Located in the Argo Highway neighborhood, 218 yards west of the Dark Astoria gate.

TalosIslandTour8.hint: Located in in the New Troy neighborhood, in the top landing of the boardwalk steps 152 yards southeast of the Tech store.

IndependencePortTour4.hint: The Air Lifter Badge is in the Power Island neighborhood, 38 yards slightly northeast of the Terra Volta gate.

IndependencePortTour5.hint: Located in the Liberty Quay neighborhood, 458 yards SSW of the neighborhood marker. The easiest way to find it is to go to the south end of the zone and head due north from the western tree along the security fence of the storage yard.

IndependencePortTour6.hint: Located in the Power Island neighborhood, at the bottom of the boardwalk ramp on the south side of the island.

IndependencePortTour7.hint: Located in the Bell Point neighborhood, on the bridge 285 yards west of the Architect Entertainment building.

IndependencePortTour8.hint: Located in the Industry Pier neighborhood, directly in front of the Freedom Corps store.

FoundersFallsTour3.hint: Located in the Williams Square neighborhood, on the north side of the fountain in the main plaza.

FoundersFallsTour4.hint: Located in the Hutchinson Park neighborhood, 82 feet east of the Eden gate.

FoundersFallsTour5.hint: Located in the Hutchinson Park neighborhood, right next to where Indigo is standing, 325 yards east of the Eden gate.

FoundersFallsTour6.hint: Located in the Blackstone Hills neighborhood, 33 yards east of the neighborhood marker.

FoundersFallsTour7.hint: Located 114 yards NNE of the hospital, directly in front of Janet Kellum and Maxwell Christopher.

FoundersFallsTour8.hint: Located directly in front of Agent Six, the Natural store.

BrickstownTour3.hint: Located on the roof of the Zig, 36 yards northwest of the neighborhood marker.

BrickstownTour4.hint: Located at the north entrance of the Dark Waters neighborhood, 196 yards north of the neighborhood marker.

BrickstownTour5.hint: Located on the Mashu Bridge, 97 feet east of the neighborhood marker.

BrickstownTour6.hint: Located in the Seven Gates neighborhood. The path to it starts at the basketball courts approximately 250 yards south of the hospital.

BrickstownTour7.hint: Located 390 yards southwest of the Science store, at the bottom of the zone. There is a section of road that has been built over the ruined foundations of some buildings, with the badge located near a blue car that is buried underneath.

BrickstownTour8.hint: Located in the Abyss Towers neighborhood, in front of the first building on your left as you enter the underside section from the east side.

KallistiWharfTour1.hint: Located on the left shoulder of the statue of Statesman in the center of the zone, within 100 ft of the One Statesman Plaza neighborhood marker.

PeregrineIslandTour1.hint: Located on a small island, approx. 834 yards southwest of the talos-island Ferry, and the marker is located in the center of the grassy area, between the rock outcropping and the large electrical tower.

PeregrineIslandTour2.hint: Located in the Bayside Docks neighborhood, behind the Recluse's Victory PvP Recruiter—33 yards northeast of Ghost Falcon and 360 yards southwest of the Bayside Docks marker.

PeregrineIslandTour3.hint: Located under the metal detector in the lobby of the center Portal Corp building.

PeregrineIslandTour4.hint: Located in the Cutlass Isles neighborhood, under the large skeleton 277 yards southwest of the neighborhood marker.

PeregrineIslandTour5.hint: Located in the Cutlass Isles neighborhood at a section of ruined gate 241 yards ENE of the neighborhood marker.

PeregrineIslandTour6.hint: Located in the Cutlass Isles neighborhood, on the northeast shore of the small northernmost island.

PeregrineIslandTour7.hint: Located in the Poseidon Square neighborhood. on the top of a fire escape 138 yards southwest of the neighborhood marker.

PeregrineIslandTour8.hint: Located in the Tempest Quay neighborhood, on the southwest shore of the northern island. **Be Careful:** Approaching this badge will bring you into close proximity of Devouring Earth Monsters.

TriedAndTrue.hint: Visit the Omega Team memorial plaques in three separate instances: * The open-world Memorial in atlas-park. * During the omega-team-memorial mission. * During the first mission in the dr-kahn-task-force.

P_Ambitious.hint: Located on top of Emperor Cole's tower in Magisterium.

P_CitizenCole.hint: Located between two bridges to Imperial City in the western part of the Elyssian Avenue neighborhood, 592 yards west of the Magisterium marker.

P_CivicMinded.hint: Located in the center of the plaza between praetor-duncan and praetor-white.

P_GuardiansOfJustice.hint: Located on top of the PPD headquarters building, 223 yards north of the Magisterium marker.

P_IntoTheWild.hint: Located along the SE edge of the island and 0.5 miles SE of the Magisterium marker, tucked into the corner of the rail by the water.

P_Technophile.hint: Located in the City Maintenance Facility 210 yards north of the southeast Elyssian Avenue marker (There are two markers for Elyssian Avenue).

P_UnCivilSociety.hint: Located 116 yards W of the Magisterium marker.

P_Waterfront.hint: Located on the lower ledge along the river, 211 yards south of Underground Access B.

P_GoldDigger.hint: Located on top of a building under construction 460 yards N of the Aureas marker.

P_MercyMissionary.hint: Located directly in front of the main building in the Behavioral Adjustment Facility.

P_ParkRanger.hint: Located 144 yards NW of the People's Park marker.

P_PraetorianOfPrivilege.hint: Located 151 yards NNW of the Four Gables marker.

P_Seen.hint: Located 241 yards SE of Aureas, or 401 yards W of the People's Park marker.

P_Seer.hint: Located 347 yards ENE of the Four Gables marker.

P_TiberianOverseer.hint: Located 185 yards N of the Tiberian Bluff marker.

P_TunedIn.hint: Located 41 yards NW of the Logos marker.

P_ClockworkMechanic.hint: Located approximately 240 yards NE of City Access B.

P_Disappeared.hint: Located approx. 345 yards NNW of City Access B.

P_FerrymanOfTheDamned.hint: Located approximately 271 yds SE of the Imperial Tunnel point.

P_Morbid.hint: Located approx. 348 yards NNE of the Imperial Tunnel access point.

P_SecretPrisoner.hint: The Secret Prisoner Badge has two locations in underground-nova: * (-1424, 511, 1957) * (-2192, 511, -2888) (534 yds NE of the Imperial Tunnel access). It is only necessary to visit **one** location to earn this badge.

P_Trainspotter.hint: Located 565 yards SE of the Imperial Tunnel point.

P_RiverRat.hint: The River Rat Badge has 19 locations in Praetoria, most of which are located under the bridges scattered throughout the zone. In locations not covered by a bridge, look for the life buoys. You will not receive the standard "Badge Earned" notification at each location. Instead, open your "Badges" window and select the category "Closest to Completion". Every time that a waypoint is reached successfully, the badge status will move up the rung towards the top. **It is necessary to visit all 19 locations to earn this badge.** This badge can be frustrating to get. Where possible, go under bridges in the water; you cannot hit the target location when on the bridge. The two easterly locations in neutropolis have bridges that are flush to the water surface; the locations are just off to one side of the bridge. It can also matter which zone you are in; the locations on the border between nova-praetoria and imperial-city can be approached in either zone. Of these four, the northernmost should be approached while in nova-praetoria; the others should be approached while in imperial-city, as should those on the imperial-city - neutropolis border. It is best to do this badge as soon as you arrive in Praetoria, even if you are very low level. There are no enemies in the water, and the method of watching "Closest to Completion" change only works if you have not unwittingly hit some of the waypoints already.

P_RailRider.hint: The Rail Rider Badge has three locations in Praetoria, each located inside one of the Cole Transit Authority stations. It is necessary to visit all three locations to earn this badge.

P_GoingRouge.hint: Located 365 yards E of the Industry Avenue marker, directly in front of Rita Mayfair.

This can be tricky to find since it's hidden in the trees, but there's a clearing 194 yards north and a little to the west of the Perez Park marker. Drop into this clearing from above, then take the path to the east to reach the badge.

Directly north, one level down, is a tunnel entrance." "The badge marker is located along the center divider inside the tunnel, 682 yards west of the Powderkeg marker.

FaultlineEaster.hint: Located inside a small room under Freight Lift C. 1. take Freight Lift C to the bottom. When exiting the lift, you will be facing south. 2. Walk down the east-facing ramp at the bottom of Freight Lift C. 3. Once at the bottom of the ramp, stand in front of the large spool of wire. 4. Walk directly north under the ramp all the way to the wall. 5. Turn directly west and there is a very narrow opening behind the boxes under the ramp. 6. Walk forward and a small doorway is on the north side, opening into a room with a Cryptic Lounge sign on the wall. 7. The badge is in the middle of that room.

FaultlineTour2.hint: Approx. 513 yrds. S of the "Dark Canyons" marker in front of the doors to a grey stoned high-rise that's tilting into the canyon, next to the west perimeter wall.

FaultlineTour3.hint: Located approx. 173 yrds NNE of the "Precipice" marker in the crevice next to a burn out car.

FaultlineTour4.hint: Approx. 140 yrds SW of the "Subduction" marker on top of a parking structure.

FaultlineTour8.hint: On the platform between the southeast and southwest turbine towers in the dam section.

FaultlineTour9.hint: Located on the grass, south of the fence around a building in the Reservoir Area.

FaultlineTour10.hint: Located approx. 360 yds S from the "Aftershock" marker in the canyon on top of a half buried building.

FaultlineTour11.hint: Located approx. 326 yrds. W from the "Reservoir" marker in a park above the crevice with the cement structures.

FaultlineTour12.hint: Directly south of the dark canyons marker, down in the cracks.

FoundersFallsTour1.hint: Located in The Gaspee neighborhood, by a fountain in front (east) of a tall building 100 yards south of The Gaspee marker.

GalaxyCityTour1.hint: The Bird Watcher Badge is in the Orion Beltway neighborhood, 87 yds south east of the Orion Beltway marker. There is a brown building on the left (east), across from Major Flanders, City of Gyros, and Paragon City Pizza. The badge marker is on the lowest ledge on the northeastern corner of the building. Though not directly accessible, there is a fire escape that leads up the eastern side of the building. A non-airborne hero may access the badge by climbing up the fire escape and jumping to the ledge from a higher height.

GalaxyCityTour2.hint: The Blue Shield Badge is in the Orion Beltway neighborhood. 80 yards east of the Orion Beltway marker there is a Vanguard billboard proclaiming, "They are among us...". The badge marker is on the back left (north) ledge of the billboard. It is possible for non-airborne heroes to earn this badge by climbing up the fire escape to the landing of the brown building southwest of billboard (the same building that has the Bird Watcher Badge on it), jumping onto the lower ledge of the building east of that building, then onto the roof of the Paragon Parts Plus building next to the billboard. From the roof of that building, it is an easy jump onto the back ledge of the billboard, where the badge marker is.

GalaxyCityTour3.hint: Located 156 yards ESE from the Arena, on top of the Mighty Mart. Non-airborne heroes can get to the badge by climbing up a fire escape on the City of Gyros building, two buildings behind (east of) the Mighty Mart building, and jumping across rooftops. The buildings in question are immediately east of the Arena.

GalaxyCityTour4.hint: Located 233 yards southeast of the Arena, at the far southern border of the Orion Beltway neighborhood in Echo: Galaxy City. The badge marker is on the clenched right fist of a statue in the southwest corner, depicting a male bald hero in a fighting pose.

GalaxyCityTour5.hint: Located in the Gemini Park neighborhood, in the middle of the large steel doors on the eastern wall of the zone, 270 yards south of the entrance to perez-park.

HollowsTour5.hint: 187 yards South of Four Seasons marker.

IndependancePortTour3.hint: Located in the Crey Cove neighborhood, in the center of the roof of a large warehouse approx. 310 yards southwest of the kings-row tunnel and directly 187 yards south of Icon.

KingsRowTour5.hint: Located in Kings Row, in the far NE corner of the Royal Refinery neighborhood.

PerezParkTour4.hint: Located 292 yards due east of the Everett Lake and 216 yards north of the Gaiman Woods neighborhood markers. It is also about 145 yards southeast of the Amphitheater.

PerezParkTour5.hint: Located in a fountain 246 yards from the skyway-city entrance.

RiktiCrashSiteTour1.hint: On the outstretched hand of the statue of Mustang.

SkywayCityTour1.hint: Located in the extreme northeast corner, between the two basketball courts.

SkywayCityTour2.hint: Located 116 yards due west of the Freedom Corp Basic Training store, on the southern border of the Astral District. Walk around the left side of the store, following the wall along the district’s border until you reach a red truck. The badge marker is behind and just to the right of the truck.

SkywayCityTour3.hint: Located at the southern end of the Hide Park neighborhood. Along the southeastern north–south wall stands a large statue of Dauntless flexing his arms. The badge is positioned approximately 60 feet in front of the statue.

SkywayCityTour4.hint: Located approx. 280 yards due west of the midpoint between the Land of the Lost marker and the helicopter to bloody-bay, on the lowest layer of the map. The badge marker is located just to the right of Vitaly Cherenko, a contact in the Land of the Lost neighborhood.

SteelCanyonTour1.hint: Located 119 yards south of the Wentworth Consignment House.

SteelCanyonTour2.hint: Located in the Steel Canyon Medical Center neighborhood, just outside and to the right of the door to the hospital, at the southeastern corner of the building.

SteelCanyonTour3.hint: Located in the Silver Lake neighborhood, on the back right (northeastern) side of the building just west of the entrance to boomtown.

SteelCanyonTour4.hint: Located in the Gimry Ridge neighborhood of Steel Canyon, on top of one of the perimeter buildings around the Paragon City University building. It is found on a ledge between the northeastern most building on the campus and the building just west of it.

StrigaTour1.hint: Located on the hinge of a large set of steel doors along the NW shore of the island.

StrigaTour2.hint: Located at the end of a dock 440 yards east of the ferry.

StrigaTour3.hint: Located approx. 46 yards from the Council Base marker on the southwestern lip of the large volcano.

TalosIslandTour1.hint: Located on the pedestal of the large Minotaur statue, directly in front of the Field Analyst, approx. 580 yards southwest of the New Thebes neighborhood marker.

TalosIslandTour2.hint: Located in the western Argo Highway neighborhood, 874 yards west of the neighborhood marker. The badge is on the island split by the western war wall, just east of the central rock outcropping.

TalosIslandTour3.hint: Located on a ship in the sea northeast of the main island, approximately 630 yards east of the Ithaca Island marker. The badge is on top of the cabin.

TerraVoltaTour1.hint: Located in the Northwest corner of Coroman Manufacturing, in a culvert. Head west from the entrance to independence-port and it can be located under pipes along the north war wall.

TerraVoltaTour2.hint: Located on top of the main reactor, on the northeast sector of the dome just before the dropoff.

TerraVoltaTour3.hint: Located in the Raysun Petroleum neighborhood, along the west war wall near a dumpster on the ground, west and slightly south of the Coroman Manufacturing marker.

TheHiveTour1.hint: Located in the middle of the road leading north into the abandoned structures, just before it breaks up into the grassy area.

TheHiveTour2.hint: Located in the dead center of the zone, where Hamidon spawns.

FirstWardTour1.hint: Located on the west side of the eastern-most island of Lock of Torment, 83 yards NNE of the map marker, at the base of a small mausoleum.

FirstWardTour2.hint: Located in the Sunken City neighborhood, slightly west of the Westerman Building marker, on the ledge directly behind Diabolique.

FirstWardTour3.hint: Located in the Free-Fire Zone neighborhood, 90 yards due west of the map marker, east of the CTA building.

FirstWardTour4.hint: Located in the The Fallen Seed neighborhood, almost perfectly equidistant between the Forbidden Crags and Sunken City markers, on the north end of a series of biomass beneath the shell of the destroyed Seed of Hamidon.

FirstWardTour5.hint: Located in the Mother of Mercy Hospital neighborhood, about 3 feet away from the map marker.

FirstWardTour6.hint: Located in the Free-Fire Zone neighborhood, 346 yards southwest of the map marker; at the bottom of a ditch along one of the Twilight World paths.

FirstWardTour7.hint: Located in the Forbidden Crags neighborhood, 149 yards southwest of the map marker atop a large hill.

FirstWardTour8.hint: Located in the Sunken City neighborhood, 163 yards NNW of the Westerman Building marker, on the shoulder of a partially submerged statue of Emperor Cole.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour1.hint: Located in the Raimi Arcade neighborhood, 176 yards south of the marker for Flicker.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour2.hint: Located in the Barca Plaza neighborhood, 212 yards north of the Barca marker, in the middle of the area behind the skyscraper.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour3.hint: Located in the Moth Cemetery neighborhood. Found at 379 yards south (and slightly east) of the Moth marker (or about 389 yards east and slightly north of the Illuminous marker) in a lake of water. In the lower-right-hand corner of the red area of the Moth Cemetery boundaries right up next to the wall.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour4.hint: Located in the Moth Cemetery neighborhood, approx. 191 yards northwest of the Moth Cemetery marker.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour5.hint: Located in the Moth Cemetery neighborhood, 516 yards west-northwest of the Moth marker, between the two mausoleums at the end of the ridge.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour6.hint: Located 339 yards ESE of the Raimi marker, on the western of two identical statues in the area. The correct statue faces southwest and is farther from the eastern wall.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour7.hint: Located in the St. Elegius neighborhood, southwest of Romero Heights and near The Bulwark. The badge is 78 yards north of the neighborhood marker, atop the hospital.

DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour8.hint: Located in the Dido's View neighborhood, 324 yards SE of the Dido's View marker.

NightWardTour1.hint: Located in the The Digs neighborhood, 263 yards NNE of the map marker, near the merit vendor.

NightWardTour2.hint: Located in the Howling Vale neighborhood, 514 yards NE of the map marker, near the center of the Black Knight's tent encampment.

NightWardTour3.hint: Located in the Arcane Quarter neighborhood, just inside the entrance to the Midnighter Mansion. To access the mansion and obtain the badge, you must first enter through an alternate entrance. The coordinates for this entrance are (1797.9, 109.6, -2416.4). It is a greenish-colored building situated atop a hill, approximately 94 yards from the Tunnel entry marked on your map.

NightWardTour4.hint: Located in the Lamplight Junction neighborhood, 161 yards W of the map marker; near the entrance to the CTA terminal.

NightWardTour5.hint: Located in the The Sleeping Beast neighborhood, 403 yards NNE of the Howling Vale map marker inside the husk of the fallen Seed of Hamidon.

NightWardTour6.hint: Located in the The Arcane Quarter neighborhood, 99 yards S of the map marker, near the Mistress of Fate.

NightWardTour7.hint: Located in the The Digs neighborhood, 464 yards SSE of the map marker, near the capsized boat.

NightWardTour8.hint: Located in the City of Souls neighborhood, 433 yards NE of the map marker, at the top of the Night Ward version of the Westerman Building.

CommSpecialist.hint: Next to a red and white communications tower antenna.

Shielded.hint: Located around 11:57 on the clock if the ship is the clock face, right up against the shield.

CroatoaTour1.hint: Located on the floor of the Grim Vale between the three standing stones.

CroatoaTour2.hint: Located under the wall of trees, 300 yds NE from the Misty Wood waypoint, NE of the small round pond.

CroatoaTour3.hint: Located on a low branch of the large leafless tree 360 yards to the west of War Witch and 76 yards north of the Sunset Ridge marker.

DungeonLabyrinthTour2.hint: Located beneath the white mote at the end of the Endless Colonnade.

EatenByBlarf.hint: Blarf's location is marked with a blue dot.
